class.name: SolidCone
class.brief_description: Creates a cone or frustum solid using OpenCASCADE.
class.description: [SolidCone] builds an OCCT solid cone or frustum oriented along the positive local Z axis, starting at the given origin.

method.name: build_cone
method.description: Builds the cone or frustum with the given radii, height, and base origin.
